ddls:
CREATE TABLE "prisoners" (
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prisoner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the prisoner */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the prisoner */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the prisoner */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the prisoner */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the prisoner (e.g., high school, college) */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the prisoner (e.g., employed, unemployed) */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the prisoner (e.g., married, single) */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the prisoner (e.g., low, middle, high) */,
  "family_structure" TEXT /* Family structure of the prisoner (e.g., nuclear, single-parent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prisoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recidivism_history" (
  "recidivism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recidivism record */,
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prisoner */,
  "prior_offenses" INTEGER /* Number of prior offenses */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Label indicating whether the prisoner recidivated (0/1) */,
  "expected_score" REAL /* Expected score indicating the likelihood of recidivism */,
  "time_to_recidivism" INTEGER /* Time to recidivism in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recidivism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recidivism_history_prisoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("prisoner_id") REFERENCES prisoners ("prisoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime record */,
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prisoner */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime committed (e.g., theft, assault) */,
  "crime_date" TEXT /* Date the crime was committed */,
  "sentence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the sentence in months */,
  "crime_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the crime (e.g., felony, misdemeanor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_prisoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("prisoner_id") REFERENCES prisoners ("prisoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "law_enforcement_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each law enforcement record */,
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prisoner */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of law enforcement record (e.g., arrest, citation) */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the record was created */,
  "record_description" TEXT /* Description of the record */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Law enforcement agency responsible for the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_law_enforcement_records_prisoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("prisoner_id") REFERENCES prisoners ("prisoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score of the model */,
  "roc_auc" REAL /* Area under the ROC curve */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_bias" (
  "bias_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bias record */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "bias_type" TEXT /* Type of bias (e.g., racial, socioeconomic) */,
  "bias_value" REAL /* Value of the bias */,
  "bias_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the bias (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bias_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prisoner */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., education, job training) */,
  "intervention_date" TEXT /* Date the intervention was provided */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the intervention (e.g., organization, individual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_prisoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("prisoner_id") REFERENCES prisoners ("prisoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., superuser, moderator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the administrator (e.g., IT, Research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administrator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the administrator's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_administrator_id FOREIGN KEY ("administrator_id") REFERENCES administrators ("administrator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prison_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prison facility */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the prison facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the prison facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the prison facility */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the prison facility (e.g., minimum, medium, maximum) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prisoner_facility_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prison facility history record */,
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prisoner */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prison facility */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the prisoner was admitted to the facility */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the prisoner was released from the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prisoner_facility_history_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES prison_facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prisoner_facility_history_prisoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("prisoner_id") REFERENCES prisoners ("prisoner_id")
)
